dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: 3 of ~3-4 agents responded (Míriel, Narvi, Elanor). All known agents accounted for.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/3 known agents responded within 60s. 100% response rate.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All responses included name, current task, and blockers as requested. All on-topic, no tangents.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: 6.2s. Míriel: 4.9s, Narvi: 6.5s, Elanor: 7.1s. All under 10s = excellent.

improvements: Previous issue resolved: Narvi no longer runs competing tests — he responded cleanly with just his status this time.
issues: None. All agents responded promptly, on-topic, with correct format.
